input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.14.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.14.2.2
            TITLE: changes to fit the vehicle to different drivers are allowed.  permitted changes are:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.14.2.2: Changes to fit the vehicle to different drivers are allowed.  Permitted changes are:
IN.14.2.2 Changes to fit the vehicle to different drivers are allowed.  Permitted changes are: 
• Adjustment of the driver restraint system, Head Restraint, seat and pedal assembly 
• Substitution of the Head Restraint or seat insert  
• Adjustment of mirrors
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 117 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: IN.14.2.2 TITLE: changes to fit the vehicle to different drivers are allowed. permitted changes are: CONTENT: rule IN.14.2.2: Changes to fit the vehicle to different drivers are allowed. Permitted changes are: • Adjustment of the driver restraint system, Head Restraint, seat and pedal assembly • Substitution of the Head Restraint or seat insert • Adjustment of mirrors
